onboarding.travelDescription: From the itinerary to expenses, keep your whole trip in one place so you can focus on enjoying it.
onboarding.expensesDescription: Add expenses, split them however you want, and forget complex calculations, even while traveling across countries.
onboarding.goalsDescription: Create savings goals, track progress, and arrive ready for your next destination.

home.noRecentExpensesCopy: When you create an expense with friends, it will appear here.

settings.title: Settings
settings.exportExcelCopy: Download a CSV compatible with Excel
settings.advancedExpenseDetailsCopy: Places, contacts, reservations, and notes per expense
settings.scanQrCopy: Invite your space companions to scan the code to join the space.
settings.inviteCopy: Start managing shared expenses for the space

settings.moveExpensesDescription: Choose a destination category to empty this category.
settings.withoutCategoryCopy: Expenses will remain without an assigned category.
settings.noMovableCategories: There is no other available category. You can leave the expenses uncategorized.

form.name: Name
form.newCopy: You can create it just for yourself or share it later.
form.imageCopy: It will be compressed automatically before saving.

participants.title: Add participants
participants.noSearchResults: We did not find matches. You can create it with the name only.
participants.transferFailed: Could not transfer the space owner
participants.manualAddCopy: If we find a registered user with that name or username, we will show them below. Otherwise, you can create the participant manually.
participants.ownerTransferCopy: This person will be able to edit settings, manage participants, and delete the space. You will remain as a participant.
participants.ownerTransferConfirm: You are about to transfer the space to {name}.
participants.unlinkCopy: The linked account will be removed, but the participant name will remain so another person can claim it later.
participants.unlinkConfirm: You are about to unlink {name} from their current account.
participants.removeCopy: You can only remove them if they have no expenses.
participants.removeConfirm: You are about to remove {name} from the space.

participants.noSearchResultsManual: We did not find matches. You can create it manually.

participants.alreadyInGroup: This user is already in the space

participants.createdCopy: You can now share the link and invite more people.

goals.title: Goals
goals.notice: Under construction: this section may change or have errors
goals.emptyCopy: When you create a goal it will appear here with its progress and deadline.
goals.buildingCopy: We are improving this section. The experience may change and be unstable for now.
goals.whatTitle: What do you want to achieve?
goals.previewTitle: This is how your goal will look
goals.stepOneCopy: The type defines the visual vibe, suggested pace, and how progress will feel.
goals.stepTwoCopy: It should feel like something worth opening and sharing.
goals.stepThreeCopy: Vornway calculates the pace needed to arrive on time.
goals.stepFourCopy: The goal can be strict, flexible, or simply suggest a pace.
goals.stepFiveCopy: You can search users or create manual participants to claim later.
goals.stepSixCopy: Confirm the plan before creating the fund.
goals.typeEventDescription: Social plans, dates, and visible contributions.
goals.typeCustomDescription: Define your own vibe and rhythm.
goals.modeManualDescription: Each contribution is recorded when it happens.
goals.modeMonthlyDescription: Ideal for fixed quotas and monthly tracking.
goals.modeFlexibleDescription: No fixed pressure, but visible progress.

detail.name: Name
detail.recentActivityCopy: The latest movement for this goal.
detail.emptyContributionsCopy: Register the first movement so progress comes to life.
detail.membersCopy: Who is on track and who needs to contribute.
detail.calendarCopy: Estimated monthly pace to arrive on time.
detail.editGoalCopy: Adjust the objective without losing existing contributions.
detail.noAccess: You do not have access to this goal
detail.deleteContributionConfirm: Confirm if you want to delete this contribution

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.emptyTitle: You do not have notifications yet
notifications.emptyCopy: Start by creating your first adventure and we will notify you about what is new

profile.title: My profile
profile.usernameRules: Use 3 to 24 characters. Only lowercase letters, numbers, dots, and underscores.
profile.chooseUsernameCopy: Everyone needs one so searching and adding friends is much easier.
profile.editUsernameCopy: Other people will see this name when they search for you or add you.
profile.reportBugSubtitle: Something did not work as expected
profile.requestFeatureSubtitle: Share an improvement or a new idea
profile.logoutCopy: Logging out will remove access to synced content on this device.
profile.disableNotificationsCopy: If you disable them, you will stop receiving expense, change, and space activity alerts in this app.
profile.installInstructionsCopy: Follow these steps to install Vornway as an app on your device.
profile.installIosShare: Tap the share button in Safari
profile.installIosAddHome: Scroll down and tap "Add to Home Screen"
profile.installAndroidMenu: Tap the options menu (three dots) in your browser
profile.installAndroidAdd: Select "Install app" or "Add to Home Screen"
profile.installDesktopIcon: Look for the install icon in the address bar
profile.installDesktopMenu: Or use the browser menu → "Install Vornway"
profile.sessionsCopy: Manage the devices where you are signed in.
profile.noSessions: There are no open sessions right now.
profile.photoUpdateFailed: Could not update the profile photo
